title: Disclosure of source of purses and purse supplements
doc_html:
§198.  Disclosure of source of purses and purse supplements

Each racing association shall disclose, in writing in the condition book maintained by it, the source of all purses and purse supplements to be distributed by it on each racing day.

Acts 1992, No. 1028, §1.
